$description: Theme library. Each theme defines the SAME token names with different values; swap one tokens.css to switch. _shared.components.css is common to all.

themes.name: Teal
themes.summary: Single teal accent on near-white surfaces. The default. Calm, professional, no fancy colours.

themes.name: Indigo
themes.summary: Indigo/violet accent. Slightly more modern/SaaS feel, still neutral surfaces.

themes.name: Slate
themes.summary: Near-monochrome slate. The most understated option — colour only ever signals status.
